Features

Innovative Tools for Smarter Trading

Take your trading to the next level with our innovative platform. Stay on track, gain insights, and maintain the right mindset to transform your trading.

Strategy Page
Trading Hub
TradeSage AI
Log Trade
Strategy

Strategy Page

The Strategy Page keeps you disciplined by tracking your setups, strategies, and rule adherence in one place. Create custom rules and see which setups perform best over time.

Track every setup, strategy, and rule you follow daily.
Instantly visualize patterns in your consistency and discipline.
Your Trading Hub, Tailored to You

The Problem We Solved

Many traders are stuck in cycles of wins and losses, unsure why. Traditional journals felt like homework, and basic tools showed only results, not reasons or improvements. Everything changed when you begin tracking your habits, rule following and the why behind every decision.

Saves time by automating stat tracking.
Provides actionable feedback to improve trading performance.
Offers real-time analysis into your progress and areas for improvement.
Build Discipline That Pays

SAGE AI

SAGE analyzes your complete trading history to answer any question about your performance. Ask what's holding you back, which setups actually make you money, and where your habits are costing you profit, and get personalized, data-driven answers that help you trade more like your most profitable self.

Plan for Success Before Entering the Market

Log Your Trades

The Log Trade page is your personal space to journal each trade. Connect your broker and seamlessly see your data displayed in front of you. Watch your trades back in real time.

Capture Every Trade
Add Visuals & Thoughts
Spot Patterns & Improve
Build Discipline That Pays

Journal Section

Our Journal Section allows you to log and organize your trading days, strategies, and even personal reflections. By journaling consistently, you build a record of your thoughts, actions, and results, giving you a clear view of your decision-making process and how it evolves over time.

Keeps you organized and accountable.
Provides a comprehensive log of your trading experiences.
Helps with long-term growth by reviewing past entries.
Understand What Drives Your Success

Your Statistics

The Statistics Page offers a deep dive into your personal trading performance. This feature breaks down key metrics so you can see exactly what works, what doesn't, and where you can improve. Our easy-to-read data visualizations make complex statistics clear and actionable.

Zen Mode

A clear mind. Better trades.

The ZEN Page is a guided meditation experience designed to restore focus and mental clarity, helping traders stay present and composed throughout their trading sessions.

Reset your mind
Trade with focus
Perform with confidence

Trading moves fast. YOU can't keep up.

Session Buddy shows you exactly where you mess up, so you can stop repeating it.

Get Started Now -

Latest Insights

Feb 25, 2026 | Read time: 9 min

10 Tips to Stop Emotional Trading for Greater Trading Success

Emotional trading is one of the main reasons most traders lose money in the financial markets. Fear, greed, frustration, excitement, and stress can push a trader to ignore the trading plan and make poor decisions.

Read More

Feb 25, 2026 | Read time: 11 min

Breakout Trading Strategy: How to Spot, Trade, and Manage Market Breakouts

Breakout trading is one of the most exciting and effective ways to capture strong market moves

Read More

Feb 25, 2026 | Read time: 9 min

Emotional Control in Trading: Mastering Your Mind for Trading Success

Emotional control in trading is one of the most important skills a trader can develop. This is because it influences how you make trading decisions, how you respond to losing trades, and how consistent your trading strategy becomes over time.

Read More
